strengths: 12+ years of full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Current AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks)
Strong testing/craftsmanship background — TDD, CI/CD, taught Selenium and testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java exposure is dated (robotic arms, 2016-2018)
Cloud/containerization signal is thin — Docker and AWS CDK mentioned but no deep Kubernetes/GCP/Azure track record

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and weak Kotlin signal

response.justification: Candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years bar with deep TypeScript/Node/React experience, an active AI-agent infrastructure role at re:cinq aligning directly with the AI agent requirement, and a strong testing/craftsmanship culture matching the Vitest/quality expectations. Gaps around Nest.js and Kotlin are real but learnable for someone with his polyglot history (D, Java, C++, Swift, PHP). Cloud depth is moderate rather than strong. Overall a clear interview.
